Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MAURICIO SANTIAGO NARVAEZ Motion To Quash Summons And Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Continued To Apr-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Mauricio Santiago Blanco Narvaez
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF PETROS BERKE Motion To Compel Deposition Of Mauricio Santiago Blanco Narvaez as follows: Denied without prejudice. The Court lacks jurisdiction over nonparties with respect to a motion based on service of motion by mail. (See Lund v. Superior Court (1964) 61 Cal.2d 698, 713 [requiring contempt procedures]; In re Marriage of Lemen (1981) 114 Cal.App.3d 769, 780 [allowing motion where non-party appeared at deposition].) ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Carla Parra
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling PLAINTIFF PETROS BERKE Motion To Compel Deposition Of Carla Parra as follows: Denied without prejudice. The Court lacks jurisdiction over nonparties with respect to a motion based on service of motion by mail. (See Lund v. Superior Court (1964) 61 Cal.2d 698, 713 [requiring contempt procedures]; In re Marriage of Lemen (1981) 114 Cal.App.3d 769, 780 [allowing motion where non-party appeared at deposition].) ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
